docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$635.25 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-02-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA LIAINA, KENETI
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-20-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH. NOT REPORTED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR ROSEN, MATTHEW AS ATTORNEY FOR LIAINA, KENETI

DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM WITH RESPECT TO JAHMON BURTON - PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND TO STRIKE THE CLAIM IS DENIED. HOWEVER CLAIMANT MAY NOT INTRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS OR ANY EVIDENCE ON THE SUBJECTS ENCOMPASED BY THE DISCOVERY CLAIMANT HAS FAILED TO RESPOND TO. = PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $335.25 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT KENETI LIAINA. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $300.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Ntc Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim with respect to JAHMON BURTON - Petitioner's request for terminating sanctions and to strike the claim is denied. However claimant may not introduce any documents or any evidence on the subjects encompased by the discovery Claimant has failed to respond to. = Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =(301/PJB)
